goal: Add the current-user endpoint (GET /api/v1/me) and admin-only user creation (POST /api/v1/admin/users) with password-reset trigger.

tasks.name: Create MeController with GET /api/v1/me
tasks.action: Create MemberSummary and MeResponse record DTOs. Create MeController @RestController with GET /api/v1/me that loads current user from JWT principal, optionally loads linked Member via MemberRepository, returns ApiResponse<MeResponse>. Add sacco-member dependency to sacco-security pom.xml.

tasks.name: Create CreateUserRequest DTO and extend UserManagementService
tasks.action: Create CreateUserRequest with username, email, roleNames, optional memberId, sendPasswordResetEmail (default true). Add createUser(CreateUserRequest) to UserManagementService interface. Implement: validate uniqueness, resolve roles, create UserAccount with random temp password, link memberId, trigger password reset email if requested.

tasks.name: Create UserAdminController with admin user creation and password reset trigger
tasks.action: Create UserAdminController @RestController at /api/v1/admin/users with @PreAuthorize hasRole ADMIN. POST /api/v1/admin/users delegates to createUser. POST /api/v1/admin/users/{id}/password-reset triggers password reset for user by ID.
verify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q

planVerify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q
commitMessage: feat(custom-auth-api): add /api/v1/me endpoint and admin user creation
